summary: A Go-based orchestration and detection framework with a plugin system, schema validation, and Kubernetes integration.
concerns: recent commits are dominated by session/chore metadata updates rather than feature work
feedback triage commits suggest potential false-positive issues in detection logic
clean git status combined with housekeeping commits may indicate stalled development
suggestions: investigate the false-positive feedback items (FB-511) to improve detector accuracy
focus on core feature development over session metadata management
review plugin integration to ensure the plugin system is actively utilized
